entries.author: St. Cyprian of Carthage
entries.body: So Daniel, too, when he was required to worship the idol Bel, which the people and the king then worshipped, in asserting the honor of his God, broke forth with full faith and freedom, saying, “I worship nothing but the Lord my God, who created the heaven and the earth” [Dn 14:5].
entries.citation: Letters 55:5Daniel 14 is not in the Protestant Bible
